name: openoutreach_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the openoutreach capability.

prompts.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompts.template: Find LinkedIn leads for the product described as: '{product_description}' targeting the market: '{target_market}'.
prompts.use_case: Sales teams looking to automate lead generation on LinkedIn.

prompts.name: outreach_message_prompt
prompts.template: Generate a personalized connection request message for leads in the '{target_market}' market about our product: '{product_description}'.
prompts.use_case: Marketing professionals targeting specific industries or roles for campaigns.
